---
title: "TBCA Management Effectiveness and Governance Tool"
subtitle: "Static Quarto + GitHub Pages prototype"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
.tbca-shell {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem 3rem 1.25rem;
}
.tbca-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 0.8fr;
  gap: 1.25rem;
}
.tbca-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #d9e1e7;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.tbca-card h3, .tbca-card h4 { margin-top: 0; }
.tbca-section {
  border-top: 1px solid #edf1f4;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  padding-top: 1rem;
}
.tbca-question { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.tbca-question label.main { font-weight: 600; display:block; margin-bottom:.45rem; }
.tbca-options label { display:block; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: .35rem; }
.tbca-input, .tbca-textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid #c7d2da;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: .65rem .8rem;
}
.tbca-textarea { min-height: 110px; }
.tbca-toolbar {
  display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:.6rem; margin:.75rem 0 1rem 0;
}
.tbca-btn {
  border:none; border-radius: 999px; padding:.65rem .95rem; cursor:pointer;
  background:#0d6efd; color:#fff; font-weight:600;
}
.tbca-btn.secondary { background:#6c757d; }
.tbca-btn.light { background:#eef3f7; color:#213547; }
.tbca-badge {
  display:inline-block; padding:.25rem .55rem; border-radius:999px; background:#eef3f7; font-size:.9rem;
}
.tbca-kpi { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; margin: .25rem 0; }
.tbca-small { color:#5c6b77; font-size:.95rem; }
.tbca-report {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  background:#f8fafb;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: .9rem;
  border: 1px solid #e4ebf0;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .tbca-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
</style>

<div class="tbca-shell">

  <div class="tbca-card">
    <h3>Prototype purpose</h3>
    <p>This is a <strong>GitHub Pages-compatible static prototype</strong>. It demonstrates how the Excel-based tool can become a browser-based workflow with structured questions, transparent scoring, local save/export, and a workshop-ready summary report.</p>
    <div class="tbca-toolbar">
      <button class="tbca-btn" onclick="saveLocal()">Save in browser</button>
      <button class="tbca-btn secondary" onclick="downloadJSON()">Export JSON</button>
      <button class="tbca-btn light" onclick="window.print()">Print / Save PDF</button>
      <button class="tbca-btn light" onclick="clearFormData()">Clear</button>
    </div>
    <div class="tbca-small">For a first release on GitHub Pages, responses are stored in the participant's browser and can be exported for workshop collation.</div>
  </div>

  <div class="tbca-grid">
    <div>
      <div id="form-host"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="tbca-card">
        <h4>Assessment summary</h4>
        <div class="tbca-badge">Live scoring</div>
        <div id="overall-score" class="tbca-kpi">–</div>
        <div id="overall-label" class="tbca-small">Complete the scored questions to see a summary.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="tbca-card">
        <h4>Section scores</h4>
        <div id="section-scores"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tbca-card">
        <h4>Automated report preview</h4>
        <div id="report-preview" class="tbca-report">No report text yet.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
let QUESTIONS = [];
const STORAGE_KEY = "tbca-prototype-v1";

async function initTool() {
  const res = await fetch('questions.json');
  QUESTIONS = await res.json();
  renderForm();
  loadLocal();
  updateSummary();
}

function groupedQuestions() {
  const out = {};
  QUESTIONS.forEach(q => {
    if (!out[q.section]) out[q.section] = [];
    out[q.section].push(q);
  });
  return out;
}

function renderForm() {
  const host = document.getElementById('form-host');
  const groups = groupedQuestions();
  host.innerHTML = Object.entries(groups).map(([section, questions]) => `
    <div class="tbca-card">
      <h3>${section}</h3>
      ${questions.map(renderQuestion).join('')}
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

function renderQuestion(q) {
  if (q.type === 'text') {
    return `
      <div class="tbca-question">
        <label class="main" for="${q.id}">${q.label}</label>
        <input class="tbca-input" id="${q.id}" type="text" oninput="updateSummary()" />
      </div>`;
  }
  if (q.type === 'textarea') {
    return `
      <div class="tbca-question">
        <label class="main" for="${q.id}">${q.label}</label>
        <textarea class="tbca-textarea" id="${q.id}" oninput="updateSummary()"></textarea>
      </div>`;
  }
  if (q.type === 'score') {
    return `
      <div class="tbca-question">
        <label class="main">${q.label}</label>
        <div class="tbca-options">
          ${q.options.map(opt => `
            <label>
              <input type="radio" name="${q.id}" value="${opt.value}" onchange="updateSummary()" />
              ${opt.label} <span class="tbca-small">(${opt.value})</span>
            </label>
          `).join('')}
        </div>
      </div>`;
  }
  return '';
}

function getValue(q) {
  if (q.type === 'text' || q.type === 'textarea') {
    return document.getElementById(q.id)?.value || '';
  }
  if (q.type === 'score') {
    const checked = document.querySelector(`input[name="${q.id}"]:checked`);
    return checked ? Number(checked.value) : null;
  }
  return null;
}

function setValue(q, value) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) return;
  if (q.type === 'text' || q.type === 'textarea') {
    const el = document.getElementById(q.id);
    if (el) el.value = value;
  }
  if (q.type === 'score') {
    const el = document.querySelector(`input[name="${q.id}"][value="${value}"]`);
    if (el) el.checked = true;
  }
}

function collectData() {
  const data = {};
  QUESTIONS.forEach(q => data[q.id] = getValue(q));
  return data;
}

function saveLocal() {
  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(collectData()));
  alert('Responses saved in this browser.');
}

function loadLocal() {
  const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
  if (!raw) return;
  try {
    const data = JSON.parse(raw);
    QUESTIONS.forEach(q => setValue(q, data[q.id]));
  } catch (e) {
    console.error(e);
  }
}

function clearFormData() {
  if (!confirm('Clear all answers in this browser?')) return;
  localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
  QUESTIONS.forEach(q => {
    if (q.type === 'text' || q.type === 'textarea') {
      const el = document.getElementById(q.id);
      if (el) el.value = '';
    }
    if (q.type === 'score') {
      document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${q.id}"]`).forEach(el => el.checked = false);
    }
  });
  updateSummary();
}

function downloadJSON() {
  const payload = {
    exported_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    tool: 'TBCA Governance Tool Prototype',
    responses: collectData()
  };
  const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2)], {type: 'application/json'});
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = 'tbca_responses.json';
  a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

function updateSummary() {
  const scores = QUESTIONS
    .filter(q => q.type === 'score')
    .map(q => ({section: q.section, value: getValue(q)}))
    .filter(x => x.value !== null);

  const total = scores.length ? scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b.value, 0) / scores.length : null;

  document.getElementById('overall-score').textContent = total ? total.toFixed(1) + ' / 5' : '–';
  document.getElementById('overall-label').textContent = total ? interpretScore(total) : 'Complete the scored questions to see a summary.';

  const bySection = {};
  scores.forEach(x => {
    if (!bySection[x.section]) bySection[x.section] = [];
    bySection[x.section].push(x.value);
  });

  document.getElementById('section-scores').innerHTML =
    Object.entries(bySection).map(([section, vals]) => {
      const avg = vals.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / vals.length;
      return `<div class="tbca-section"><strong>${section}</strong><div>${avg.toFixed(1)} / 5</div><div class="tbca-small">${interpretScore(avg)}</div></div>`;
    }).join('') || '<div class="tbca-small">No scored answers yet.</div>';

  buildReport(total, bySection);
}

function interpretScore(x) {
  if (x >= 4) return 'Strong readiness / favourable conditions';
  if (x >= 3) return 'Moderate feasibility with areas needing support';
  return 'Substantial barriers or risks to address';
}

function buildReport(total, bySection) {
  const data = collectData();
  const lines = [];
  lines.push('TBCA MANAGEMENT EFFECTIVENESS AND GOVERNANCE TOOL — WORKSHOP SUMMARY');
  lines.push('');
  lines.push(`Initiative: ${data.A1_name || '[not filled]'}`);
  lines.push(`Countries: ${data.A1_countries || '[not filled]'}`);
  lines.push('');
  lines.push(`Overall indicative score: ${total ? total.toFixed(1) + ' / 5' : '[not enough information]'}`);
  if (total) lines.push(`Interpretation: ${interpretScore(total)}`);
  lines.push('');
  lines.push('Section overview:');
  if (Object.keys(bySection).length === 0) {
    lines.push('- No scored responses yet.');
  } else {
    Object.entries(bySection).forEach(([section, vals]) => {
      const avg = vals.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / vals.length;
      lines.push(`- ${section}: ${avg.toFixed(1)} / 5 (${interpretScore(avg)})`);
    });
  }
  lines.push('');
  lines.push('Discussion points:');
  if (data.general_comment) {
    lines.push(data.general_comment);
  } else {
    lines.push('[no notes added]');
  }
  document.getElementById('report-preview').textContent = lines.join('\n');
}

initTool();
</script>
```
